arts.ttl: Predicted Teams Real Madrid-Celta Vigo: Carlo Ancelotti to go all-out for Copa del Rey clash
arts.sum: Real Madrid and Celta Vigo are both aiming to progress to the quarter-finals of the 2024-25 Copa del Rey, as the two teams prepare to face off at the Santiago Bernabeu on Thursday evening. Real Madrid will be aiming to bounce back from last weekend’s Spanish Super Cup humiliation against Barcelona, and Carlo Ancelotti is […] The post Predicted Teams Real Madrid-Celta Vigo: Carlo Ancelotti to go all-out for Copa del Rey clash appeared first on Football España.

arts.sum: The question now is whether Bayern will improve their offer again before the agent leaves, otherwise they run the risk that he could reach an agreement with another club such as Real Madrid Alphonso Davies’ agent will leave Munich tomorrow.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid vs Celta Vigo 2025 live stream: Time, TV channels and how to watch Copa del Rey online
arts.sum: Real Madrid host Celta Vigo in a single-elimination Copa del Rey game. Coach Ancelotti will not be expected to make many rotations, which means that Real Madrid should take this game very seriously knowing that the crowd at the Santiago Bernabeu will be monitoring the team’s performance very closely.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid receive ‘the yes’ from leading transfer target

arts.ttl: Trent Alexander-Arnold to Real Madrid: Here we go
arts.sum: Liverpool right-back Trent Alexander-Arnold is ready to announce that he is leaving the club to join Real Madrid . “Following months of agonising over his future, Trent Alexander-Arnold has now decided that he will leave his hometown club Liverpool this summer,” it states.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid vs Celta Vigo, 2025 Copa del Rey: Predicted lineups
arts.sum: Real Madrid take on Celta Vigo in the Copa del Rey, with Ancelotti not expected to make many rotations even though the domestic tournament has never been a priority for Los Blancos. HOW TO WATCH, STREAM COPA DEL REY
